description: Sector overlay for French sports federations, clubs, academies, event organizers, athlete welfare, anti-doping, integrity, safeguarding, and sports-governance documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Sports. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: Federation approval, delegation, or sports-organization authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for sports federation approval, delegation, club registration, event authorization, or Ministry of Sports evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Ethics, integrity, safeguarding, or violence-prevention evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ethics charter, safeguarding, discrimination prevention, violence prevention, integrity, Signal-Sports, or reporting controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Anti-doping prevention, controls, or sanctions evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for anti-doping, prohibited substances, controls, sanctions, AFLD, WADA/AMA, or athlete education evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Athlete, minor, medical, or member data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for athlete data, minor data, medical records, membership data, GDPR/RGPD, privacy notice, or retention evidence.
